# Landing Page Builder

## Purpose

Build message-matched landing-page structure for a campaign.

## Invocation

Use this skill when the current task requires this specific marketing operation.

## Procedure

1. Read campaign card.
2. Create hero.
3. Create proof blocks.
4. Create FAQ.
5. Define tracking events.

## Output

Create or update Markdown files only.

## Required memory behavior

- Cite source files or source notes used.
- Update relevant memory files when new reusable knowledge is produced.
- Create a run log if the skill produces campaign, experiment, or strategy output.
